Topic 6: The propaganda machine & Jewish gatekeepers

[305:39]The way that a company like Daily Wire

[305:42]or Fox News for that matter, or the Washington Post,

[305:45]the way that these companies work

[305:47]is they are actually not for-profit enterprises.

[305:55]Now, practically speaking, they are.

[305:58]They are profit-making enterprises.

[306:00]They are classified as for-profit corporations

[306:03]and corporate entities.

[306:10]They don't actually need an audience.

[306:12]They don't need a subscriber base because they occupy a space.

[306:18]that we could call institutional media,

[306:21]it serves a political function,

[306:24]more than an economic function.

[306:30]although they are technically a for-profit entity

[306:33]that for years turned a profit

[306:35]and made its owners and shareholders very rich,

[306:38]they don't need to.

[306:44]Daily wire, they might incidentally make money and they did for a time, but that's not why

[306:51]they exist and they don't need to make money.
